scripts.deploy:anvil: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url anvil --broadcast --skip-simulation
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd contracts && forge script script/DeploySepolia.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --broadcast --verify --verifier sourcify -vvvv
scripts.deploy:sepolia:etherscan: cd contracts && forge script script/DeploySepolia.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --broadcast --verify -vvvv
scripts.deploy:payroll:sepolia: cd contracts && FEE_RECIPIENT=0x2cA6c628E6Fd6F7a7A4Cfb48daF3dF6f079783A4 forge script script/DeployPayrollSepolia.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --broadcast --verify --verifier sourcify -vvvv
scripts.deploy:payroll:sepolia:etherscan: cd contracts && FEE_RECIPIENT=0x2cA6c628E6Fd6F7a7A4Cfb48daF3dF6f079783A4 forge script script/DeployPayrollSepolia.s.sol --rpc-url sepolia --broadcast --verify -vvvv
scripts.reset: pkill -f anvil || true; pkill -f 'next dev' || true
scripts.build: yarn workspace @pulse/sdk build && yarn workspace @pulse/scheduler build
scripts.typecheck: yarn workspace @pulse/sdk typecheck && yarn workspace @pulse/scheduler typecheck
